questions.q: During its third launch in April 2026, Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket unfortunately placed which company's "BlueBird 7" cellular broadband satellite into an unusable, lower-than-planned orbit?

In April 2026, which country's defense ministry announced it had sent machines into the battlefield, expanding frontline logistics with a plan to deploy 25,000 ground robots by mid-2026 to replace human soldiers?
On April 19, 2026, U.S. Customs and Border Protection launched the 'CAPE' portal to begin processing what specific transactions for American businesses?
Fueled by a major surge in the entry-level 3D printing market, which company officially overtook Creality to become the world's top-selling budget 3D printer brand in 2026?

After being declared 'technically ready' by the European Commission in April 2026, an official age-verification app was bypassed by hackers in under two minutes—despite the developers already flagging the code as unfit for real-world use on which code-hosting platform?
